summary: Reconciled MCP boundary docs and config with active runtime policy: aligned opencode-mcp-config.json dormant entries with mcp-dormant-policy.json, rewrote server-list.md to remove stale tavily/github entries and add 3 active internal wrappers plus dormant section, updated setup-instructions.md to reflect active internal MCP wrappers, added canonical source-of-truth note to cli-mcp-surface-policy.md, and extended mcp-inventory-regression tests to assert dormant/active alignment across config files.
